description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front face features a grid of dark brown trim outlining three main sections, likely indicating doors or panels, set against a light gray or off-white surface. The sides and top are plain and smooth, with no visible hardware or ornamentation, emphasizing its clean lines. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood, with a veneer or laminate finish for durability and aesthetics. The structure is solid and boxy, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways. Its flat top surface can support additional objects, while the interior likely provides ample storage space.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with dark brown trim and light gray panels, featuring a clean, minimalist design and flat surfaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows a grid of dark brown trim outlining three main sections on a light gray background, suggesting multiple doors or panels.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, smooth surface with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a completely flat, unadorned light gray surface, with no openings or trim.
description_view_3: The right side view is identical to the left, showing a plain, featureless surface.
